title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how entrepreneur Alex Hormozi uses AI across his businesses, identifying a four-pillar system: Data as moat, voice-first thinking, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. The video covers a critical team mistake that required intervention by Hormozi's wife Leila, CEO of Acquisition.com.
